_note: Versioned price sheet so dollar-cost is comparable across models without hardcoding stale rates in report.py. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. A results run references a sheet via price_sheet_id; report.py computes $ cost only when a run carries an input/output token split (the two are priced differently). Update effective_at + bump id when rates change; never edit a published id in place.

2026-06.source: list prices as of 2026-06; verify before quoting externally
